name: B&H Photo Video
description_short: B&H Photo Video is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.6/5 with 36,668 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
B&H Photo Video is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 36,668 Google reviews and a 4.6/5.0 rating, B&H Photo Video has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a audio visual equipment supplier, camera store, computer software store, B&H Photo Video provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. B&H Photo Video operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering B&H Photo Video should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
